case_title: CAPITAL ONE BANK VS. EDWARD J MORAN

docket_entries.description: DECLARATION OF COUNSEL RE: INTEREST FILED BY PLAINTIFF CAPITAL ONE BANK

APPLICATION FOR ENTRY OF SISTER STATE JUDGMENT; NOTICE OF SISTER STATE JUDGMENT ISSUED FILED BY PLAINTIFF CAPITAL ONE BANK AS TO DEFENDANT MORAN, EDWARD J JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED
DECLARATION OF NON SERVICE FILED BY PLAINTIFF CAPITAL ONE BANK

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 1710.25 C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF CAPITAL ONE BANK RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT MORAN, EDWARD J $2,267.00 PRINCIPAL, $1,295.60 INTEREST, $225.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $3,787.60, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT ALL FURTHER PROCESSING TO BE DONE BY DEFAULT SECTION
DECLARATION ON NON SERVICE FILED BY PLAINTIFF CAPITAL ONE BANK
